'''Bentro''' was a [[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Fleet Admiral]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

==Biography==
In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], Bentro was the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] [[Command ship/Legends|command ship]], [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']]. Bentro was in command of the ''Executor'' when Vader brought his command ship to [[Shelkonwa]] in an effort to capture [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]]. Bentro was eventually replaced as the commander of the ''Executor'' by [[Kendal Ozzel/Legends|Kendal Ozzel]], at the behest of [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]], for the sake of "keeping an eye on him".

==Appearances==
*[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] {{Ab|Allegiance (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
